resetPage.message: Are you sure you want to reset page {{pageNum}}? This will clear the current text and queue it for re-processing. Any unsaved edits will be lost.

reOcrError.message: Failed to start re-OCR for this page. Please try again.

triggerSpellCheck.title: Run Spell Check
triggerSpellCheck.message: This will queue all OCR-complete pages in this book for dictionary spell check. The worker will process them automatically.

reindex.title: Confirm Re-vectorization
reindex.message: Are you sure you want to re-chunk and re-embed all pages in this book? This is useful for model upgrades or fixing search issues. Existing content will be preserved.

reindexError.title: Re-vectorization Error
reindexError.message: Failed to start re-vectorization. Please try again.

redoOcr.title: Redo Full OCR
redoOcr.message: This will re-run OCR on every page. Existing content is preserved and replaced page-by-page as new OCR completes — the book stays readable throughout. Continue?

retryFailed.message: Are you sure you want to retry failed pages from their current step?

ocr.message: Are you sure you want to reprocess all pages from the OCR step? All current text will be deleted.

chunking.message: Are you sure you want to reprocess all pages from the Chunking step? Existing chunks will be deleted.

embedding.message: Are you sure you want to reprocess all pages and chunks from the Embedding step?

word-index.message: Are you sure you want to regenerate the Word Index?

spell-check.message: Are you sure you want to re-run Spell Check?

hero.title: Together We Build Kitabim
hero.subtitle: Help us preserve and digitize Uyghur literature for future generations

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.paragraph1: Kitabim.AI is a community-driven platform dedicated to preserving, digitizing, and making accessible Uyghur books and literature. We combine cutting-edge AI technology with human expertise to create the largest digital Uyghur library.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: Our mission is to ensure that Uyghur culture, knowledge, and literary heritage are preserved for future generations. We believe that access to knowledge in one's native language is a fundamental right.

spellingMistakes.title: Why Do Books Have Spelling Mistakes?
spellingMistakes.paragraph1: Our books are digitized using Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology powered by AI. While OCR has improved significantly, it's not perfect—especially with Uyghur script which has unique characteristics and multiple writing styles.
spellingMistakes.paragraph2: Old books, faded text, different fonts, and printing variations can confuse OCR systems. That's where human editors come in! Our community of volunteer editors carefully review and correct these texts to ensure accuracy.

smartLibrary.title: Smart Library & Chat
smartLibrary.paragraph1: Our platform is not just for reading books. We have implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based knowledge system that can answer any questions based on the factual knowledge within the books.
smartLibrary.paragraph2: With our 'Smart Chat' feature, you can search for information across all books in the library and chat directly with an intelligent AI assistant in your native language.

howToHelp.title: How You Can Help
howToHelp.subtitle: Every contribution, big or small, makes a difference

editor.title: Join as Editor
editor.description: Help us correct spelling mistakes and improve book quality. No technical skills required—just fluency in Uyghur and attention to detail.
editor.benefit3: Join a community of passionate volunteers

developer.title: Join Dev Team
developer.description: Help us build mobile apps, improve our platform, and develop new features. We use React, Python, and modern AI technologies.
developer.benefit1: Work with React Native, FastAPI, and AI

donate.title: Support Us
donate.description: Help us cover server costs, AI API usage, and infrastructure expenses. Your donation keeps this platform free for everyone.
donate.benefit1: Keep the platform free and accessible
donate.benefit3: Help us scale to more books
donate.comingSoon: Donation system coming soon! Thank you for your interest in supporting Kitabim.AI
